# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-sa
  namespace: elasticseach-infra
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-sa
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: cluster-admin
subjects:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      namespace: elasticseach-infra
      name: elasticsearch-sa
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
   name: snapshot-configuration
   namespace: elasticseach-infra
data: 
   config.yml: |-
     version: 2
     to_repository:
       enabled: true
       repository_type: "s3"
       s3:
         access_key: $ACCESSKEYID
         secret_key: $SECRETACCESSKEY
         bucket_name: $S3BUCKETNAME
         region: $REGION
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
   name: snapshot-configuration-secret
   namespace: elasticseach-infra
   labels:
      app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
    type: Opaque
data:
  config.yml: |-
     version: 2
     to_repository:
       enabled: true
       repository_type: "s3"
       s3:
         access_key: $ACCESSKEYID
         secret_key: $SECRETACCESSKEY
         bucket_name: $S3BUCKETNAME
         region: $REGION
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
   name: snapshot-configuration-secret
   namespace: elasticseach-infra
     labels:
      app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
    type: Opaque
data:
  config.yml: |-
     version: 2
     from_repository:
       enabled: true
       repository_type: "s3"
       s3:
         access_key: $ACCESSKEYID
         secret_key: $SECRETACCESSKEY
         bucket_name: $S3BUCKETNAME
         region: $REGION
---

   namespace: elasticseach-infra
     labels:
      app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
    type: Opaque
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: snapshot-configuration-sa
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: cluster-admin
subjects:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      namespace: elasticseach-infra
      name: snapshot-configuration-sa
---

      namespace: elasticseach-infra

kind: Secret
metadata:
   name: snapshot-configuration-secret
   namespace: elasticseach-infra
     labels:
      app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
    type: Opaque
data:
  config.yml: |-
     version: 2
     from_repository:
       enabled: true
       repository_type: "s3"
       s3:
         access_key: $ACCESSKEYID
         secret_key: $SECRETACCESSKEY
         bucket_name: $S3BUCKETNAME
         region: $REGION
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
   name: snapshot-configuration-secret
   namespace: elasticseach-infra
     labels:
      app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
    type: Opaque
data:
  config.yml: |-
     version: 2
     from_repository:
       enabled: true
       repository_type: "s3"
       s3:
         access_key: $ACCESSKEYID
         secret_key: $SECRETACCESSKEY
         bucket_name: $S3BUCKETNAME
         region: $REGION
---
